name: Triad Business Bank
summary: Triad Business Bank provides various banking products and services to small and midsize businesses and their owners in Winston-Salem, High Point, and Greensboro in North Carolina, the United States. It offers checking, savings, money market, and retirement accounts; certificates of deposit; personal, term, and secured loans; lines of credit; and letters of credit, such as export letters of credit, export documentary collections, import letter of credit, import documentary collections, and foreign or domestic letters of credit. The company also provides debit and credit cards; merchant services; online, mobile, and telephone banking services; mobile deposit products; and treasury solutions consisting of receivable, such as lockbox, remote deposit capture, and mobile capture; payables, including ACH origination, wire origination, and purchase cards; and fraud protection services. Triad Business Bank was founded in 2020 and is based in Greensboro, North Carolina.
